title: Prebarfun 100 Pcs Pom Poms, 4 cm/5 cm Pompoms for Crafting, Large Pom Pom, Craft Pom Poms for DIY Creative Crafts, Coloured Pom Poms for Adults and Pets
features: 【Colourful】 Pom poms contains 50pcs 4cm and 50pcs 5cm pom poms large in bright and rich colours such as crimson, pink, orange and so on. Bright and vivid colours allow for unlimited creative possibilities.

【100 Pcs Large Pompoms】 Craft pom poms contains a large quantity of pom in a variety of colours, providing endless crafting possibilities and no need to worry about running out of materials. Perfect for diy enthusiasts and craft lovers.
【Soft】These craft pompoms balls large are made of soft and durable material, fluffy and elastic, and easy to glue for crafting. Can be fun for pets to play with.

【Not Easily Pilling】 Large pom poms for craft are perfect for adults, providing a fun and engaging way to use your creativity. These pompoms are not prone to pilling and lose lint, ensuring long-lasting use and enjoyment.

【DIY Creative】 Giant pom poms are great for making a variety of projects including toys, home decor, accessories, gifts, party decorations and educational colour sorting activities. let your imagination run wild with these coloured pom poms!
